title: dieteria canescens var. incana
intro: Dieteria canescens var. incana, also known as the hairy greasewood or gray greasewood, is a perennial plant species in the sunflower family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dieteria canescens var. incana include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and aid in digestion. Dieteria canescens var. incana can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal uses.
